title: symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. litoreum
intro: Symphyotrichum novi-belgii var. litoreum, also known as Coastal Michaelmas Daisy, is a variety of flowering plant native to the coastal areas of North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is also rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, providing several health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting cardiovascular health. Coastal Michaelmas Daisy can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
